data.name: Harpsy

weaponImprint.name: Antinomy
weaponImprint.trait: AoE damage dealt increased by 5%. If dealing AoE Corrosion damage, damage dealt is additionally increased by 5%.
weaponImprint.effect: Corrosion damage increased by 25%/28%/31%/34%/37%/40%. After using an active skill on an allied target, critical damage dealt increased by 5%/7%/9%/11%/13%/15% for 1 round.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to Mokosh units is increased by 2.5%. If the target has Corrosion debuffs, increase damage by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: As a member of Team 404, she provides strong technical support. Her first impression might be that she's timid and hesitant, but her unwavering sense of responsibility is the deciding factor that made her a member of 404. Always seeking security, she not only continuously improves her skills but also strives to overcome her shortcomings. Why not give this introverted little cat a pat on the head and offer her some encouragement?

skills.name: Precision Strike
skills.description: Selects 1 target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack.

skills.name: Macro Virus
skills.description:
After actively attacking, restore 2 points of Confectance Index to self.

For each point of Confectance Index consumed when using Ultimate skill, trigger [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d] effect once.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
After actively attacking, restore 2 points of Confectance Index to self.

For each point of Confectance Index consumed when using Ultimate skill, trigger [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d] effect once.

Each time Priority Process is triggered, increase attack and critical damage by 3%, up to 15%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Each time [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d] is triggered, increase attack and critical damage by 3%, up to 15%.

skills.name: Wide-Area Amplification
skills.description: Select 1 ally within 6 tiles. Apply [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d] for 2 rounds, and extend the duration of [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d] on all allied units by 1 round. Gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] after using this skill. If the target already has [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d], restore 3 points of Confectance Index to self. This skill can be used at most 1 time per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 ally within 6 tiles. Apply [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d] for 2 rounds, and extend the duration of [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d] on all allied units by 1 round. Gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] after using this skill. If the target already has [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d], restore 3 points of Confectance Index to self. This skill can be used at most 2 times per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Confectance Index cost reduced by 1. Uses per turn increased by 1.

skills.name: Fight Poison With Poison
skills.description: Select 1 enemy within 6 tiles and deal 90% of attack as AoE Corrosion damage, knock back 3 tiles, and apply 2 stacks of [effect:b1f656db-5ccb-424b-b6d9-d7ac75ae77c0].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 enemy within 6 tiles and deal 120% of attack as AoE Corrosion damage, knock back 3 tiles, and apply 2 stacks of [effect:b1f656db-5ccb-424b-b6d9-d7ac75ae77c0].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Damage multiplier increased to 120%.

[effect:b1f656db-5ccb-424b-b6d9-d7ac75ae77c0] gains a new effect: When the holder dies, transfer all stacks to a random allied unit.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: [effect:b1f656db-5ccb-424b-b6d9-d7ac75ae77c0] is modified: When triggered, consumes 70% of the existing stacks (rounded up), and the damage multiplier per stack is increased to 30%.

skills.name: Cyber Punch
skills.description: Select 1 enemy within 6 tiles and deal 90% of attack as AoE Corrosion damage. When more than 2 allies on the field have [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d], damage dealt by [effect:b1f656db-5ccb-424b-b6d9-d7ac75ae77c0] is increased by 30% for 1 round.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 enemy within 6 tiles and deal 90% of attack as AoE Corrosion damage. When Confectance Index is greater than 3 points, consume all Confectance Index. For each additional point consumed, damage multiplier increases by 20%. When more than 2 allies on the field have [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d], damage dealt by [effect:b1f656db-5ccb-424b-b6d9-d7ac75ae77c0] is increased by 30% for 1 round.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Select 1 enemy within 6 tiles and deal 120% of attack as AoE Corrosion damage. When Confectance Index is greater than 3 points, consume all Confectance Index. For each additional point consumed, damage multiplier increases by 20%. When any ally on the field has [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d], this skill's damage multiplier is doubled. When more than 2 allies on the field have [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d], damage dealt by [effect:b1f656db-5ccb-424b-b6d9-d7ac75ae77c0] is increased by 30% for 1 round.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: When Confectance Index is greater than 3 points, consume all Confectance Index. For each additional point consumed, damage multiplier increases by 20%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Damage multiplier increased to 120%. New effect: When any ally on the field has [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d], this skill's damage multiplier is doubled.

keys.effect: After applying a debuff, damage dealt is increased by 10% for 1 round.
After using active skill Wide Area Amplification, gain 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].
When [effect:b1f656db-5ccb-424b-b6d9-d7ac75ae77c0] is applied, [effect:4ee67890-3dba-4901-8dc0-136ff36c5d67] is also applied to the target for 1 turn.
After action ends, allied units with [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d] gain [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] for 1 turn.
For each allied unit with [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d], the damage multiplier of for each stack of [effect:b1f656db-5ccb-424b-b6d9-d7ac75ae77c0] is increased by 2%.
After using Wide Area Amplification on an allied doll with [effect:5a7232cb-b6a0-485a-a03e-a77cd087d28d], increase critical rate by 20% for 1 round.
The range of active skills and basic attack are increased by 2 tiles.

vertebrae.effect: Confectance Index cost reduced by 1. Uses per turn increased by 1.

doll.name: Harpsy
doll.effects: As a member of Team 404, she provides strong technical support. Her first impression might be that she's timid and hesitant, but her unwavering sense of responsibility is the deciding factor that made her a member of 404. Always seeking security, she not only continuously improves her skills but also strives to overcome her shortcomings. Why not give this introverted little cat a pat on the head and offer her some encouragement?

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with Corrosion debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Corrosion damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets with 50% or lower HP is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt by attacks that only hit 1 enemy unit is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

Before using an active skill or basic attack, the applier deals 20% of attack as AoE Corrosion damage to them and applies 1 random powerful debuff for 2 turns. For each additional stack, damage multiplier increases by 20%. Consumes all stacks when triggered. Stackable. Corrosion-type debuffs cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"9c9637f0-a923-46c5-928f-ff87aa155313","upgradeName":"V4","upgradeDetails":"

Before using an active skill or basic attack, the applier deals 20% of attack as AoE Corrosion damage to them and applies 1 random powerful debuff for 2 turns. For each additional stack, damage multiplier increases by 20%. Consumes all stacks when triggered. Upon death, transfers all stacks to a random allied unit. Stackable. Corrosion-type debuffs cannot be cleansed.

","order":0},{"id":"304653d6-a7ef-4597-bbc1-6219dde544ec","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

Before using an active skill or basic attack, the applier deals 30% of attack as AoE Corrosion damage to them and applies 1 random powerful debuff for 2 turns. For each additional stack, damage multiplier increases by 30%. Consumes 70% of stacks when triggered (rounded up). Upon death, transfers all stacks to a random allied unit. Stackable. Corrosion-type debuffs cannot be cleansed.

","order":1}]}

After dealing damage with an active attack, applies 1 stack of [effect:b1f656db-5ccb-424b-b6d9-d7ac75ae77c0] to a random enemy target, prioritizing targets with the fewest stacks of [effect:b1f656db-5ccb-424b-b6d9-d7ac75ae77c0]. Cannot be cleansed.
Active skill and basic attack range reduced by 2 tiles.
